title: centrosema pubescens
intro: Centrosema pubescens, also known as 'prickly sensitive plant', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centrosema pubescens include reducing swelling and pain, treating wounds and skin irritations, and alleviating symptoms of fever and rheumatism. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions made from its leaves, which can be used to treat various health issues when taken under the guidance of a medical professional.
